heroHeadline: Sudan War Enters Fourth Year as 'Abandoned Crisis'
heroSubtitle: A coalition of NGOs reported on April 13 that millions of Sudanese civilians are surviving on just one meal a day as the civil war enters its third year, with families in North Darfur and South Kordofan resorting to eating leaves and animal feed; the ongoing SAF-RSF conflict has systematically eroded food supply chains and humanitarian access across conflict zones, compounding what the UN describes as one of the world's largest humanitarian crises
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, UNHCR, WFP, OHCHR, WHO, ACLED, HRW, Radio Dabanga, Sudan Tribune, Reuters, Al Jazeera, MSF, Darfur24, AFP, Anadolu Agency, The National, UN News, UN Security Council, IOM, Washington Post, MadaMasr, Xinhua, Asharq Al-Awsat, Sudan Horizon, Foreign Policy, The Reporter Ethiopia, RT Africa, Abren, Pravda Sudan, Radio Tamazuj, Amnesty International, Africanews, Wikipedia (Sudan Civil War Timeline 2026)
